statement.en: For a reasoning agent facing genuinely underdetermined input, deliberate persistence in NEITHER (unknown) or FLOWING (evolving) is epistemically superior to forced collapse to TRUE/FALSE. Conjectured: any reasoning system without W-48 accumulates false commitments at a rate proportional to its deliberation depth.

reiTyping.rationale: W-48 Negative Capability (Keats 1817 → Rei): the ability to remain in uncertainty, doubt, and mystery without irritable reaching after fact and reason, formalized as deliberate persistence in NEITHER/FLOWING states rather than premature collapse to TRUE/FALSE.

formalization.notes: Foundational framework; formal verification scope per-component
